name: Plum Jam Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the beaten egg, skim milk, and vegetable oil.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened and no visible flour remains.
5. Fill each muffin tin (greased with non-stick spray) 2/3rds full with the batter.
6. Spread about 1 teaspoon of plum jam in the center of each filled muffin cup.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Serve warm.
